relationships: kab:Marie ur teẓri ara dakken d nettat ay yettwasmemmin
kab:Mary tenna-d dakken nettat d takanadit
kab:Mary tenna-iyi-d dakken nettat d tasnutlayt
kab:Mary tenna-iyi-d dakken nettat d tanesbaɣurt
kab:Ur ttizmireɣ ara ad xedmeɣ ayagi mebla nettat
kab:Yella ccek d ameqqran dakken mačči d nettat i ixedmen axeddim-nni
